title: Hotdog PvP
description: A pvp pack with hotdog totem as an extra to it.
body:
### Credits
This project is based around [Marlow](https://www.youtube.com/@Marlowww)'s awsome pvp pack  [Vanilla+ V2](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SAf7IZ4jrUI)

### What does it add?
- New Recipe book Gui
- Some textures are more detailed
- 3d End crystal
- Animation for some textures (for example: end pearl)
- Hotdog totem (if u rename it to talalxr it will become a cat)
- More simple planks
- Border around wools

<details>
<summary>Terms of use</summary>
Author: CrimsonFlames

**When you can use my asset:**

In modpacks on curseforge, modrinth

Any private modifications of the original resource pack.

Making a youtube video on it

**When you cannot use:**

Distribution on the Bedrock Marketplace

Locking behind a paywall

Distribution of original assets on any platforms.

**Links:**

- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hotdog-pvp)

- [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/hotdog-pvp)
</details>
